judgment.summary: Cloudflare is a high-growth, high-margin business that remains unprofitable and carries a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.25 beat the 0.23 estimate by 7.0%, with the next earnings date on 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth of 33.5% shows strong top-line expansion.
Gross margin of 73.3% indicates high scalability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $755.00M shows healthy cash generation.
Total cash of $4.16B provides a strong liquidity position.
Mean analyst target of $234.18 suggests potential upside.
negatives: Forward P/E of 130.13x reflects a very high valuation.
Profit margin of -3.7% shows the company is not yet profitable.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 30.13x indicates a premium valuation.
